resultRows.geneticAnalysis: A derived MCM6/LCT rs4988235 CT call is available for lactase-persistence context. This is not a histamine-intolerance result, food-allergy result, mast-cell result, symptom explanation, elimination-diet recommendation, supplement recommendation, lab interpretation, or treatment result.
resultRows.plainEnglishMeaning: This marker can provide lactose-related context, but histamine questions require separate evidence, symptom history, diet history, labs, allergy evaluation, and professional review.

histamineContext: Use this report as educational nutrition-genetics context, not as a histamine-intolerance, allergy, or mast-cell diagnosis.
Bring symptoms, food history, allergy history, labs, supplement questions, and treatment questions to qualified professionals when relevant.
Do not change foods, supplements, medications, or treatment based on genotype alone.

references.title: Nutritional Genomics and Direct-to-Consumer Genetic Testing

uncertainty: Histamine intolerance, allergy, mast-cell disorders, digestive symptoms, and food response require broader clinical, dietary, laboratory, and professional context.

A single marker should not be used to diagnose histamine intolerance, diagnose allergy, explain symptoms, prescribe elimination diets, recommend supplements, interpret labs, claim foods are safe or unsafe, or guide treatment.
limitations: This validation result uses derived evidence only; raw genome data is not included.

The report is educational and does not diagnose histamine intolerance, diagnose food allergy, diagnose mast-cell disorders, diagnose digestive disorders, diagnose lactose intolerance, explain symptoms, prescribe elimination diets, recommend supplements, interpret labs, claim foods are safe or unsafe, or provide treatment guidance.
